query:
ALTER TABLE progress 
  CHANGE COLUMN userId runId INT NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN moduleId stepCode VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN completedSteps completed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
